title: Michael B. Jordan Reacts to Golden Globe Nomination - Hollywood Reporter
text: Michael B. Jordan received his first Golden Globe nomination for his dual role as the Smokestack twins in director Ryan Coogler's film Sinners. Jordan described the experience of playing identical twins Elijah Smoke Moore and Elias Stack Moore as exceptionally demanding. When asked about potentially playing dual roles again, he stated: this is the hardest thing I've done so far. The most challenging role for sure. The actor explained the complexity of embodying two distinct personalities within the same physical form, noting that neither character is complete without the other. Sinners earned seven Golden Globe nominations total. Jordan credited audience enthusiasm and word-of-mouth promotion for the film's $400 million box office success.
